item.name: Leopard Prawn
item.description:
The unpredictable patterns on this crustacean's carapace indicate its freshness and depth of flavor when cooked.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Cousins to the Yanxian tiger prawn, these crustaceans are scrutinized at market like a cut of expensive beef─per the gastronomically astute, the more vivid and varied the pattern of the carapace, the richer the flesh will be.
